title: cordyline australis var. lineata
intro: Cordyline australis var. lineata, also known as the Cabbage Tree or Palm Lily, is a variety of the Cordyline australis plant native to New Zealand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cordyline australis var. lineata include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
